files.patch:
@@ -111,1 +111,0 @@ - *

@@ -471,0 +470,2 @@ + * If a built builder is operated on to append a block parameter, append an operation, build a sibling block, + * then an {@code IllegalStateException} is thrown. @@ -473,1 +474,1 @@ - * parameters, appended operations, their operation results, or created block references, result in an exception. + * parameters, appended operations, their operation results, or block references, result in an exception. @@ -475,2 +476,7 @@ - * If a built builder is operated on to append a block parameter, append an operation, build a sibling block, - * then an {@code IllegalStateException} is thrown. + * A block builder has a code {@link #context() context} and code {@link #transformer() transformer} which are used + * to transform an attached or root operation that is {@link #op appended}. Any sibling block builder + * {@link #block(List) created} from a block builder will have the same code context and code transformer. + *

+ * A block builder may be {@link #rebind rebound} to new block builder that builds the same block but with a + * different code context and code transformer. The rebound block builder can be used to apply alternative + * transformations to attached or root operations that are appended. @@ -481,1 +487,1 @@ - final CodeTransformer ot; + final CodeTransformer ct; @@ -483,1 +489,1 @@ - Builder(Body.Builder parentBody, CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ot) { + Builder(Body.Builder parentBody, CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ct) { @@ -486,1 +492,1 @@ - this.ot = ot; + this.ct = ct; @@ -498,1 +504,1 @@ - * {@return the block builder's operation transformer} + * {@return the block builder's code transformer} @@ -501,1 +507,1 @@ - return ot; + return ct; @@ -527,1 +533,1 @@ - return parentBody.entryBlock.rebind(cc, ot); + return parentBody.entryBlock.rebind(cc, ct); @@ -538,1 +544,1 @@ - * Rebinds this block builder with the given context and operation transformer. + * Rebinds this block builder to a new block builder with the given context and code transformer. @@ -540,1 +546,1 @@ - *

Either this block builder and the returned block builder may be operated on to build + *

Either this block builder and the rebound block builder may be operated on to build @@ -545,1 +551,1 @@ - * @param ot the operation transformer + * @param ct the code transformer @@ -548,2 +554,2 @@ - public Block.Builder rebind(CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ot) { - return this.cc == cc && this.ot == ot + public Block.Builder rebind(CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ct) { + return this.cc == cc && this.ct == ct @@ -551,1 +557,1 @@ - : this.target().new Builder(parentBody(), cc, ot); + : this.target().new Builder(parentBody(), cc, ct); @@ -555,1 +561,1 @@ - * Creates a new sibling block in the same parent body as this block. + * Creates a new sibling block builder in the same parent body as this block builder. @@ -565,1 +571,1 @@ - * Creates a new sibling block in the same parent body as this block. + * Creates a new sibling block builder in the same parent body as this block builder. @@ -571,1 +577,1 @@ - return parentBody.block(params, cc, ot); + return parentBody.block(params, cc, ct); @@ -634,11 +640,2 @@ - * Transforms a body starting from this block builder, using a code transformer. - *

- * This method first rebinds this builder with a child context created from - * this builder's context and the given operation transformer, and then - * transforms the body using the code transformer by - * {@link CodeTransformer#acceptBody(Builder, Body, List) accepting} - * the rebound builder, the body, and the values. - * - * @apiNote - * Creation of a child context ensures block and value mappings produced by - * the transformation do not affect this builder's context. + * Transforms a body starting from this block builder, using a {@link CodeContext#create(CodeContext) child} + * context of this builder's context and a given code transformer. @@ -648,2 +645,2 @@ - * @param ot the operation transformer - * @see CodeTransformer#acceptBody(Builder, Body, List) + * @param ct the code transformer + * @see #body(Body, List, CodeContext, CodeTransformer) @@ -652,1 +649,1 @@ - CodeTransformer ot) { + CodeTransformer ct) { @@ -655,1 +652,1 @@ - ot.acceptBody(rebind(CodeContext.create(cc), ot), body, values); + body(body, values, CodeContext.create(cc), ct); @@ -659,1 +656,1 @@ - * Transforms a body starting from this block builder, using a given operation transformer. + * Transforms a body starting from this block builder, using a given context and code transformer. @@ -661,3 +658,2 @@ - * This method first rebinds this builder with the given context - * and the given operation transformer, and then - * transforms the body using the operation transformer by + * This method first {@link #rebind rebinds} this builder with the given context + * and code transformer, and then transforms the body using the code transformer by @@ -674,1 +670,2 @@ - * @param ot the operation transformer + * @param ct the code transformer + * @see #rebind(CodeContext, CodeTransformer) @@ -678,1 +675,1 @@ - CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ot) { + CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ct) { @@ -681,1 +678,1 @@ - ot.acceptBody(rebind(cc, ot), body, values); + ct.acceptBody(rebind(cc, ct), body, values); @@ -685,2 +682,2 @@ - * Appends an operation to this block builder, first transforming the operation if it is attached to a block, - * or a root operation. + * Appends an operation to the sequence of operations of this block builder, first transforming the operation + * if it is attached to a block, or a root operation. @@ -691,3 +688,3 @@ - * {@link Op#transform(CodeContext, CodeTransformer) transformed} with this builder's context and - * code transformer, the resulting transformed and unattached operation is attached and appended, and the - * operation's result mapped to the transformed operation's result, using the builder's context. + * {@link Op#transform(CodeContext, CodeTransformer) transformed} with this builder's code context and + * code transformer, the resulting transformed and unattached operation is appended and attached, and the + * operation's result mapped to the transformed operation's result, using the builder's code context. @@ -702,1 +699,1 @@ - *

  • it's a terminating operation and a terminating operation is already appended. + *
  • a terminating operation is already appended as the last operation. @@ -721,1 +718,1 @@ - transformedOp = op.transform(cc, ot); + transformedOp = op.transform(cc, ct);

@@ -431,0 +431,3 @@ + *

+ * A body builder has an entry block {@link #entryBlock builder} from which sibling block builders may be + * {@link Block.Builder#block(List) created}. @@ -434,1 +437,3 @@ - * Creates a body builder with a new context, and a copying transformer. + * Creates a body builder, with an entry block {@link #entryBlock builder} that has a + * {@link CodeContext#create() new} code context and a {@link CodeTransformer#COPYING_TRANSFORMER copying} + * code transformer. @@ -436,1 +441,1 @@ - * @param ancestorBody the nearest ancestor body builder, may be null if isolated + * @param ancestorBody the nearest ancestor body builder, may be {@code null} if isolated @@ -448,1 +453,2 @@ - * Creates a body builder with a copying transformer. + * Creates a body builder, with an entry block {@link #entryBlock builder} that has the given code context + * and a {@link CodeTransformer#COPYING_TRANSFORMER copying} code transformer. @@ -450,1 +456,1 @@ - * @param ancestorBody the nearest ancestor body builder, may be null if isolated + * @param ancestorBody the nearest ancestor body builder, may be {@code null} if isolated @@ -452,1 +458,1 @@ - * @param cc the context + * @param cc the code context @@ -462,1 +468,2 @@ - * Creates a body builder. + * Creates a body builder, with entry block {@link #entryBlock builder} that has the given code context + * and code transformer. @@ -473,3 +480,5 @@ - * If the ancestor body is null then the created body builder is isolated and descendant operations may only - * use values declared within the created body builder. Otherwise, operations - * may use reachable values declared in the ancestor body builders (outside the created body builder). + * If the ancestor body is {@code null} then the created body builder is isolated and descendant operations may + * only use values declared within the created body builder. Otherwise, operations may use reachable values + * declared in the ancestor body builders (outside the created body builder). + *

+ * The entry block {@link #entryBlock builder} @@ -477,1 +486,1 @@ - * @param ancestorBody the nearest ancestor body builder, may be null if isolated + * @param ancestorBody the nearest ancestor body builder, may be {@code null} if isolated @@ -479,2 +488,2 @@ - * @param cc the context - * @param ot the transformer + * @param cc the code context + * @param ct the code transformer @@ -483,1 +492,0 @@ - * @see #of(Builder, FunctionType, CodeContext, CodeTransformer) @@ -486,1 +494,1 @@ - CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ot) { + CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ct) { @@ -488,1 +496,1 @@ - return body.new Builder(ancestorBody, bodySignature, cc, ot); + return body.new Builder(ancestorBody, bodySignature, cc, ct); @@ -504,1 +512,1 @@ - CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ot) { + CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ct) { @@ -515,1 +523,1 @@ - this.entryBlock = eb.new Builder(this, cc, ot); + this.entryBlock = eb.new Builder(this, cc, ct); @@ -647,1 +655,1 @@ - Block.Builder block(List params, CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ot) { + Block.Builder block(List params, CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ct) { @@ -651,1 +659,1 @@ - return block.new Builder(this, cc, ot); + return block.new Builder(this, cc, ct); @@ -662,0 +670,1 @@ + // @@@ Remove @@ -669,4 +678,14 @@ - * A new body builder is created with the same function type as this body. - * Then, this body is {@link Block.Builder#body(Body, java.util.List, CodeContext, CodeTransformer) transformed} - * into the body builder's entry block builder with the given code context, operation transformer, and arguments - * that are the entry block builder's parameters. + * A new body builder is first {@link Body.Builder#of(Builder, FunctionType, CodeContext, CodeTransformer) created} + * with the following arguments: + *

    + *
  • an ancestor body builder that is the {@link Block.Builder#parentBody parent} body builder of the entry block + * builder {@link CodeContext#getBlock(Block) associated} with this body's ancestor entry block in the parent code + * context, otherwise {@code null} if this body has no ancestor entry block or there is no associated entry block + * builder. + *
  • this body's signature. + *
  • a {@link CodeContext#create(CodeContext) child} code context of the given parent code context. + *
  • the given code transformer. + *
+ * Then the given code transformer is used to transform this body by + * {@link CodeTransformer#acceptBody accepting} the new body builder's entry block builder, this body, and the entry + * block builder's parameters. @@ -674,2 +693,2 @@ - * @param cc the code context - * @param ot the operation transformer + * @param cc the parent code context + * @param ct the code transformer @@ -678,1 +697,1 @@ - public Builder transform(CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ot) { + public Builder transform(CodeContext cc, CodeTransformer ct) { @@ -687,1 +706,1 @@ - CodeContext.create(cc), ot); + CodeContext.create(cc), ct); @@ -690,1 +709,1 @@ - ot.acceptBody(bodyBuilder.entryBlock, this, bodyBuilder.entryBlock.parameters()); + ct.acceptBody(bodyBuilder.entryBlock, this, bodyBuilder.entryBlock.parameters());

@@ -32,1 +32,1 @@
-     * body of the invokable operation with the given arguments, a new context, and an operation transformer that
+     * body of the invokable operation with the given arguments, a new context, and an code transformer that
@@ -35,1 +35,1 @@
-     * The operation transformer copies all operations except return operations whose nearest invokable operation
+     * The code transformer copies all operations except return operations whose nearest invokable operation
@@ -40,1 +40,1 @@
-     * If the grandparent body has only one block then operation transformer's block builder is the return
+     * If the grandparent body has only one block then code transformer's block builder is the return
@@ -42,1 +42,1 @@
-     * created from the operation transformer's block builder. The created return block builder will have a block
+     * created from the code transformer's block builder. The created return block builder will have a block
@@ -50,2 +50,2 @@
-     * operation transformer's block builder. If they are not equal then a branch operation is added to the
-     * operation transformer's block builder whose successor is the return block builder with a block argument
+     * code transformer's block builder. If they are not equal then a branch operation is added to the
+     * code transformer's block builder whose successor is the return block builder with a block argument
